name: imap_fetch
description: Retrieve email content from the configured IMAP mailbox

mailbox.description: Mailbox folder to fetch from (default: INBOX)

since.description: Fetch emails since this ISO date

name: entity_extract
description: Extract named entities (supplier names, order numbers, dates, amounts) from text

entity_types.description: Types of entities to extract: supplier, order_id, part_id, date, amount

name: fuzzy_match_graph_node
description: Match an extracted name against existing nodes in the knowledge graph

name.description: Name to match against graph nodes

node_type.description: Type of node to search for

name: flag_for_review
description: Send a low-confidence extraction result to the human review queue

event_json.description: The extracted event data with confidence < 0.7
